text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I pass by the dance studio, I'm surprised to
hear Winning Ticket's voice from inside.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yo! Hah! YAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ticket, how many times must I say that you waste
too much effort with your moves?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You don't always have to use "full power." Try to
pace yourself a little.
choice_data_list: Hey, what are you guys doing?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello. I'd normally say it should be obvious,
but perhaps that's not the case.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
When I first saw her engaged in this activity, I
thought she was practicing karate chops.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What do you mean? I'm clearly doing dance moves!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Her words, not mine.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I got some advice from Hayahide, but it's not
really going so well.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Especially the final twirl! No matter how much I
try, I always lose my balance!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, oh, Trainer! You gotta have some advice for
me too, right?!
choice_data_list: Well, I'm not a dance instructor, so...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Actually, your insight may be valuable precisely because this isn't your area of expertise.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
If this goes on, I'm gonna make a fool of myself at
the winning concert for sure!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Come ooon! Please! I need your help!
choice_data_list: You need to amp yourself up more.
You need to amp yourself up more.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Come ooon! Please! I need your help!
choice_data_list: You need to amp yourself up more.
You need to amp yourself up more.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Amp myself up? Riiight, that's gotta be it!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: First I'll get motivated... YAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ALL RIGHT! LET'S GOOO!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... Instead of reason, you go with
motivation? You two are well matched.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I suspect you may understand Ticket more
thoroughly than I do.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
We match well? Like, we make a good pair?
W-wow!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm kinda embarrassed! But that makes me happy
too!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay, one more time! Watch me closely, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ticket fires herself up even more and manages to
nail the final twirl beautifully.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Really? That's weird, I thought I was using the
right amount...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I told you it was too much. That's why your
movement isn't clean.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
At the very least, there's no need to give those
deafening yells with every move you make.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, okay! You both have some good advice. I'll
give it another go!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Still a little too strong, I think.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Even less than that?! Okay, okay... Relax... relax...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wobble... Aaaah...
choice_data_list:
Wh-why'd you slump onto the floor? Are you
okay?

Wh-why'd you slump onto the floor? Are you
okay?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Huh? I just tried to relax my entire body.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Now you're not using enough power. How do you
plan to dance like this?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Y-you're right! Wow, Hayahide, you're so smart!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You must have studied so much... sniffle... to become that smart!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaah! Hayahide! You're great!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes, yes, I understand... Let's continue your
dance lesson.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sob... Okaaay!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a thorough lesson on the value of relaxing
her muscles, Winning Ticket ends up a little
better prepared for her future dancing endeavors.
